title: Mighty Mustardy Ukrainian Lentil Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Ukrainian dish featuring lentils, garlic, and a hint of mustard, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This Jain-friendly recipe is easy to prepare and can be made in advance for meal prep.
instructions: Rinse the lentils and soak them in water for 30 minutes.
Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the bhuna spice mix and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the mustard seeds and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the soaked and drained lentils, water, and salt to the pan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
